texto: I have mostly been terrified of listening to scary stories around a campfire. We camp a lot as a family, and at night my dad would try and tell us scary stories. This made eating s'mores difficult. The story would start with something like... 'and the old man who lived in these woods...' I would then run back into the camper terrified.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Willow Shields: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “I have mostly been terrified of listening to scary stories around a campfire. We camp a lot as a …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, man, listening pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
